feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Getting an error "UI API Server is unavailable; the installation process will not start"
entry.content:
HI,

When i logged in to sap applications i am getting an error  "UI API Server is unavailable; the installation process will not start". i have done reinstallations of sap b1 cliente agent but didn't help to resolve the error.

Please suggest

entry.title: Order Based Planning: Finite heuristic not generating planned order
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We have setup Order base planning process using SAP7 and SDI for one of our business process. The integration of master data and txn data from ECC to IBP is working with use of SDI.

We are using Finite Heuristic method in the Supply planning run. It is generating the receipts for the externally procured item without any issue. 

However, the finite heuristic is not generating any receipts against demands ( sales order and forecast) at the manufacturing plant for the inhouse produced items. The valid resource with available capacity and the PDS data are successfully integrated from ECC to IBP.

In the Supply run profile , we have not set any constraints ( capacity, lot size etc.) and the source of supply for PDS is enabled. I am expecting a planned order, but it does not plan any thing nor indicates any clue in the log.

Appreciate if you can pl share your inputs.

Subh

entry.title: SAP SD Pricing Access Sequence
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am currently working on updating the SD Pricing Access Sequence and would like to make sure we have considered all aspects during development and testing so current operations will not be jeopardized.

I would appreciate it if you can share your thoughts on what should be considered, including the risks and other factors involved.

Thank you.

Jodie Feliz Racho

entry.title: Re: Why is doing batch without stock while doing POGI?
entry.content:
@mdgolamrabbani 

Please check and share your Batch Determination setup. It should be based on your settings.

entry.title: Unpaid leave amount not showing for certain employee group
entry.content:
Good day,

I have an issue whereby an unpaid marternity leave wage type is configured but when doing payroll simulation, the amount for the unpaid leave taken is showing for certain employee subgroup but not for another. What am I missing? I have attached screenshots showing the difference on payslip.

entry.title: Requirements transfer and allocation to another plant
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently we are having 2 plants, Plant A is only for production and its procurement performed by plant B through requirements transfer (special procurement ) which is then converted to STO. Plant B perform production and procurement for both (A & B). 

Currently we are taking care it through Special procurement but the problem is that when requirements are transferred from Plant A to plant B and plant B also having requirement for the same item , at PO level SAP is unable to distinguish the source of requirement ( Plant A or B) as user wants to segregate the requirements from plant A and B but wants to generate single PO line item to minimize the impact of MPQ/MOQ.

Is there any solution?

entry.title: BUPA_DEL - AM048 & AM068 Errors
entry.content:
Dears,

Your kind expert advise is required. While trying to delete business partners using the BUPA_DEL, I am getting the errors AM068 & AM048.

Can you please guide on how to correct?

To note, archiving is not an option. The BPs need to be deleted.

Thanks.

entry.title: Warning message while converting planned order to purchase requsition
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I was converting planned order to purchase requsition ,it showing me warning message "Regard the export control protocol!"

It is YM721 message

Please provide advice.

entry.title: SAP IAG Connection with Service Now and AD
entry.content:
Problem Statement - We have a requirement that Service Now or Active Directory gets integrated with SAP IAG and is able to create Access Requests in IAG automatically. We got a confirmation from our AD Team that this API Integration is not possible. We also raised an OSS with SAP and they confirmed back that Service Now Integration with IAG is possible if Service Now is SCIM compatible.

Understanding - The Service now team needs to use the standard IAG API Scenarios to communicate with IAG. But IAG cannot communicate back to Service Now. We got a confirmation that this is a simplex connection. So how can the Access Request status be again sent to Service Now.

Requirement - Please do let us know if you have done any such kind of connection between IAG, Service Now or AD. How can the IAG Access request closure status be communicated with Service Now ?

entry.title: how to find the field length in SAP s4 hana Public cloud edition
entry.content: how to find the field length in SAP s4 hana Public cloud edition

entry.title: District field on Customer adress no translation (field CITY2)
entry.content:
Dear all

 

I am in charge of creation of new postal code / city code and district for Thailand. 

Is there possibility to key District name (field CITY2) in different language (EN and TH fo instance ? ) . 

thanks for your answer.

entry.title: SAP Community Network always refreshing with FireFox 129.0.2
entry.content:
Hello all,

Since a few days ago whenever I go into any SCN post using Firefox the tab keeps refreshing infinitely. At first I thought it was an issue with my mouse but it doesn't happen with Edge or Chrome.

Today I deleted all cookies, temp files and history and still happens.

Is anyone else experiencing the same issue? 

Thanks in advance 🙂

entry.title: EWM How to delete incorrectly created Party Entitled to Dispose
entry.content:
Hello,

We have created in error Party Entitled to Dispose, this is causing errors when Internal PO's are being created. 

How can we delete these entries? 

many thanks in advance

entry.title: Filtering on smart table - Tree Table works only on Level 0
entry.content:
The requirement is to filter a smart table - tree table for 'code' and display the entire parent hierarchy of that node. 
We use default personalisation on the smart table, but it works only on level 0. 
This is the call being made
GET Category?$filter=level%20eq%200%20and%20(name%20eq%20%27Pulp%27)&$select=code%2cname%2cstatus%2cspend%2clevel%2cparent_code%2cdrillState&$skip=0&$top=110&$inlinecount=allpages

The filter level 0 is added by default and is only filtering level 0. How do I make it level agnostic and also get its parent node as well. Is there any customisation of the query that can be made?

entry.title: SAP Community 2024 accepts URL to one Website which goes to another Website
entry.content:
Hi, SAP Community 2024 doesn't prevent URL texts from being "https://..." or "http://..." which are different from the actual URL.

e.g. today https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/problem-with-function-module-ms-word-ole-formletter-for-creating-form/m-p/13806086#M2030389 let thinks that https://github.com/... goes to https://github.com/... but it goes to somewhere else as you can see:

Could SAP Community 2024 forbid https/http texts of URLs which are different from the URL?

To clarify:

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: What is the effect of transferring or selling product without doing invoices verification
entry.content: What is the effect of transferring or selling product without invoice verification is not done for the received product from suppliers

entry.title: Seeking Advice on AI and Communication-Related Topics for Master’s Thesis
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m currently pursuing a Master’s in Media and Communication and working as a student at SAP. I’m planning to focus my thesis on the intersection of AI and communication, particularly within the SAP ecosystem.

I’m looking for suggestions on relevant and impactful thesis topics in this area. If anyone has ideas or knows of any SAP teams working on AI-driven communication strategies, I’d appreciate your guidance or connection.

Thanks in advance for your help!

Best,

Yasaman Jalaei

entry.title: Lable using DYMO printer need to print in Landscape or rotate into 90 degree
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have created lable using smartforms & printing this with the help of DYMO printer.

Currently this text is print in horizontally, We need in Vertical or landscape mode.

Please help & tell us any suggestion.

PFA.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Anjali Gore.

entry.title: SAC User ID activation
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am relatively new to SAC, appreciate any help/suggestions on how to proceed.

In SAC we have a user account not associated with any user but is a service account created to receive import job failure alerts which in turn has a forwarding rule to internal incident creation tool to automatically create incidents.

User ID's are activated via email through IdP service(Ockta).

but for service account since we do not need to give user level access, certain configurations are not maintained, such as user log in through Ockta.

Is there a way to activate SAC account without needing to click on the activation link?

Or does SAC have a way to create a service account to be able to receive alert emails.

Thank you

entry.title: Crystal Reports 14 in (unmanaged) C++
entry.content:
I have a Windows C++ application that is using Crystal Reports XI, and I want to upgrade to Crystal Reports 14. In my current application, we are getting the CLSID which we are passing to CoCreateInstance like this:

CLSIDFromProgID (L"CrystalRuntime.Application.11", &CLSID_Application);

I have installed Crystal Reports 2020 via the file: 
CR202004P_600-70005715.EXE

When I look at the Registry Keys under HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT, I see no key for CrystalReport14 that is similiar to CrystalRuntime.Application.11. What is the right key/ProgId of Crystal Reports 14 to call CLSIDFromProgID? Are there any additional things I need to download? 


These are the installations of my computer:
Operating system: Windows 10 Pro
IDE: Microsoft Visual Studio 2010, Version 10.0.40219.1 SP1Rel
Microsoft .NET Framework 4.7.02558 SP1Rel

Thank you very much in advance.
